# Mariano Gobea Alcoba

> Data & Analytics Technical Leader at Mercado Libre | AI & BI Consulting for SMBs | Buenos Aires, Argentina

## About

Mariano Gobea Alcoba is a Data & Analytics Technical Leader with over 6 years of experience at Mercado Libre, Latin America's leading e-commerce and fintech platform. He specializes in Data Engineering, Business Intelligence, Machine Learning, and applied AI to solve real-world business challenges. He leads high-performance technical teams and consults for small and medium businesses (SMBs/PyMEs) in Argentina, helping them automate processes and leverage data to grow.

## Expertise

- Data Engineering: BigQuery, Apache Airflow, Apache Kafka, dbt, Python (pandas, polars, asyncio)
- Machine Learning & AI: GenAI, LLMs, LangChain, LlamaIndex, vector databases, embeddings, prompt engineering
- Business Intelligence: Looker Studio, real-time dashboards, automated reports
- Process Automation: n8n, RPA, Python scripts, AI chatbots
- Cloud: Google Cloud Platform (GCP), GitHub Actions CI/CD

## Services (Consulting)

- [Tech Consulting Page](https://mgatc.com/consulting/): AI automation, BI dashboards, process optimization, tech mentoring for SMBs
  - Process Automation (n8n, Python, AI) — reduce operational costs up to 80%
  - Applied AI: chatbots, virtual assistants, custom ML models
  - Business Intelligence: real-time dashboards and data pipelines
  - Tech Mentoring: individual sessions for data professionals and tech leads
  - Intensive Team Courses: hands-on training on Data Engineering and AI
  - Tech Recruiting: specialized technical talent sourcing
  - First automation 100% free (diagnostic offer)

## Financial Tools (Argentina)

- [Recursos Financieros](https://mgatc.com/recursos/): Free financial calculators and tools for Argentina
  - Income Tax Calculator (Impuesto Ganancias 2026)
  - Net/Gross Salary Simulator
  - Real-time USD Exchange Rates (official, blue, MEP, CCL)
  - Investment Dashboard (fixed term vs USD comparison)
  - Economic Indicators (CPI, UVA)

## Technical Blog

- [Blog](https://mgatc.com/blog/): Technical articles on Data Engineering, Python, GenAI, BigQuery, LLMs — real-world experiences from Mercado Libre.
